results.taskDescription: Fetch top 15 HN posts and write a paragraph-style summary categorizing them by topic. Tests substantive synthesis from observation data.
results.output:
# Today on Hacker News

## AI/ML & Technology 
Valve releasing the CAD files for their Steam Controller under a Creative Commons license is a significant move toward open hardware development, potentially inspiring new innovations in gaming peripherals.

Google Cloud has introduced its next generation of fraud defense as an evolution beyond reCAPTCHA, focusing on advanced protection against sophisticated attack vectors. Additionally, Sander's exploration into the integral of diffusion models presents interesting insights for AI and machine learning practitioners.

The integration of Vibe coding with agentic engineering seems to be progressing at a pace that has some developers concerned about ethical considerations and control implications.

## Business & Workplace 
The article on appearing productive in the workplace highlights common practices used by employees to create an illusion of busyness, while 'David Sacks crashed and burned' details his departure from Trump's White House following controversies related to AI model reviews. The UK's looming jet fuel rationing for businesses underscores global supply chain challenges.

## Programming & Development 
The launch of Hallucinopedia offers a curated collection of hallucinations in various media formats, while Tilde.run introduces an agent sandbox with transactional, versioned filesystem capabilities. Clerk's 'From Supabase to Better Auth' discusses evolving authentication solutions for modern web applications.

## Hardware & Tools 
The latest Inkscape 1.4.4 release brings updates and bug fixes to the popular vector graphics editor, while a community firmware project for the Xteink X4 e-paper reader showcases user-driven hardware improvements.

## Other
Ted Turner's passing marks the end of an era in media broadcasting. Elonlit's theoretical exploration of deep learning provides new perspectives on neural network architectures and training methodologies.
